evidence: "WOW!! great action!! Great characters!! and Great world!!!"
"Not as good as the first 4 seasons but still pretty good if not a tad too complicated at times."
"It was very intriguing where season one left off and it showed season two could have been great!"
"not only did they manage to make a show that was both fun and suspensfull, but they also managed to make it interesting and full of action."
"a fun rollicking roller coaster of a ride!"
"WOW!! great action!! Great characters!! and Great world!!! was totally amazed by this and kudos to AMC and Daniel Wu!!!"
"Finally Wonder woman on the big screen!! And yes it does the franchise good!"
"I remember loving this movie as a kid and still loved it as an adult!"
"Weeds has done it and hit me over the head again!!!! Wonderfull season with great acting from all the cast!!!!"
"a surprisingly strong and touching story!! gets you in the feels!!"
"A GREAT reboot and reimaging of a very good old show that manages to be current as well as honoring the source material."
"Amazing show both me and my mom loved watching!!! Timeless story, timeless humor and timeless heart!!"

summary: The user has a strong preference for action and adventure genres, enjoying fast-paced narratives with high production quality. They value emotional resonance and sensory experiences in their viewing choices, often expressing loyalty to beloved franchises and characters.
